rationale: The cited paper is discussed mainly in the literature review as one of several prior cross-sectional approaches, with a brief note about its multivariate binomial probit identification algorithm. The citing paper then only loosely references it again when saying one benchmark model is "not directly comparable" but somewhat akin to Edwards and Allenby (2003). The core model, estimation setup, and substantive findings in the citing paper do not clearly reuse this cited paper's specific method or results.
